title: Climate Home News
description: Climate change news, analysis, commentary, video and podcasts focused on developments in global climate politics

items.title: Colombia pledges to exit investment protection system after fossil fuel lawsuits
items.description:

items.title: Nepal’s EV revolution pays off as oil crisis causes pain at the pumps
items.description:

items.title: Funding gap threatens next round of IPCC climate science reports, chair warns

items.title: Nigerians bet on solar as global oil shock hits wallets and power supplies

items.title: Middle East war is another wake-up call for fossil fuel-reliant food systems

items.title: Will the EU finally make waste pay for its growing carbon footprint?

items.title: Landmark deal to share Chile’s lithium windfall fractures Indigenous communities
